en.name: Pong
en.desc: The game that started it all
en.description: Pong is the granddaddy of all video games—the game that launched an industry! This 1972 Atari classic simulates a table tennis match with simple yet addictive gameplay. Two paddles, one ball, and endless competitive fun. Whether you remember playing this in arcades or are discovering it for the first time, Pong delivers pure, distilled gaming excitement that has stood the test of time for over 50 years.
en.objectives: Score points by getting the ball past your opponent's paddle. The first player to reach the target score wins. Master the angles, anticipate bounces, and outmaneuver the AI to become the Pong champion!
en.howToPlay: Use arrow keys or W/S to move your paddle up and down. Hit the ball to send it back. Score when the ball passes your opponent's paddle. Choose difficulty for AI challenge level.

rules.controls: Use ↑ ↓ arrow keys or W/S keys to move your paddle vertically. The paddle moves smoothly up and down the side of the screen.
mechanics: The ball bounces off top and bottom walls
Hitting the ball with different paddle positions changes its angle
Ball speed increases as the rally continues
Score a point when the ball passes your opponent
First to reach the target score wins
features: Multiple Difficulty Levels - Easy to Impossible AI
Speed Increase - Ball gets faster during rallies
Angle Control - Use paddle position to aim shots

tips: Position yourself based on ball trajectory early
Hit the ball with different paddle positions to create angles
In harder modes, anticipate ball bounces off walls
Control the pace - don't just react, dictate the game

faq.question: How do I control the ball direction?
faq.answer: Hit the ball with the edge of your paddle to create sharper angles. The center creates straight shots while edges add spin and angle.

faq.question: Why does the ball speed up?
faq.answer: Ball speed increases with each hit during a rally, making long rallies more challenging and exciting. Missing resets the speed.

faq.question: What's the best strategy against hard AI?
faq.answer: Use angles to force the AI to move quickly. Try to wrong-foot it by hitting opposite corners. Stay centered when possible.

faq.question: Can two players play?
faq.answer: This version features single-player against AI. Challenge yourself across multiple difficulty levels from beginner to expert!

zh.name: 乒乓球
zh.description: 乒乓球是所有电子游戏的鼻祖——开创了一个行业的游戏！这款1972年的雅达利经典以简单却令人上瘾的游戏玩法模拟乒乓球比赛。两个挡板，一个球，无尽的竞技乐趣。无论你是否记得在街机厅玩过，还是第一次发现它，乒乓球都能提供纯粹的、提炼的游戏刺激，经受了50多年的时间考验。
zh.objectives: 通过让球穿过对手的挡板来得分。首先达到目标分数的玩家获胜。掌握角度，预判反弹，战胜AI成为乒乓球冠军！
zh.howToPlay: 使用方向键或W/S上下移动挡板。击球将其反弹回去。球穿过对手挡板得分。选择难度设置AI挑战级别。

rules.controls: 使用↑ ↓方向键或W/S键垂直移动挡板。挡板在屏幕一侧平滑地上下移动。
mechanics: 用挡板不同位置击球会改变角度
首先达到目标分数者获胜
features: 多种难度级别 - 从简单到不可能的AI
速度增加 - 对打时球变快
角度控制 - 使用挡板位置瞄准
经典美学 - 正宗复古视觉

tips: 根据球的轨迹早期定位
使用不同挡板位置击球来改变角度
在困难模式下预判球从墙壁的反弹
控制节奏——不要只是反应，要主导比赛

faq.question: 如何控制球的方向？
faq.answer: 用挡板边缘击球创造更锐利的角度。中心创造直线球，边缘增加旋转和角度。

faq.question: 为什么球会加速？
faq.answer: 对打中每次击球球速都会增加，使长对打更具挑战性和刺激性。失误会重置速度。

faq.question: 对抗困难AI的最佳策略是什么？
faq.answer: 使用角度迫使AI快速移动。尝试打相反的角落来迷惑它。可能时保持居中。

faq.question: 可以两人玩吗？
faq.answer: 这个版本是单人对战AI。在从初学者到专家的多种难度级别挑战自己！
